title: Efficacy and safety of dabrafenib plus trametinib in adults with differentiated thyroid cancer: a randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, phase 3 trial.
abstract: In preliminary studies, dabrafenib plus trametinib showed clinically beneficial results in patients with radioactive iodine-refractory BRAF V600E -positive differentiated thyroid cancer. However, the combination has not been studied in a phase 3 trial yet. To address this, we studied the efficacy and safety of dabrafenib plus trametinib in patients with radioactive iodine-refractory BRAF V600E -positive differentiated thyroid cancer.
trial_name: Dabrafenib and Trametinib Treatment in Patients with Locally Advanced or Metastatic BRAF V600-Mutant Anaplastic Thyroid Cancer
